CLAUDE_CODE_VERSION.desc: Pin a specific Claude Code release (empty = use local binary at ~/.local/bin/claude).

CLAUDE_CODE_MODEL.desc: Model to launch with. Plain 'opus'/'sonnet' DISABLES the 1M-token context; add [1m] to enable it.
CLAUDE_CODE_MODEL.examples: opus, opus[1m], sonnet, sonnet[1m], haiku, (empty = harness default)

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_1M_CONTEXT.desc: Force-disable the 1M-token context window regardless of model (1 = disable, 0 = enable).

CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.desc: Maximum output tokens per assistant turn.

CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE.desc: Autocompact trigger as a percentage of the context window.

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_AUTO_MEMORY.desc: Disable automatic memory loading (1 = disable, 0 = enable).

CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL.desc: Default model used by subagents spawned via the Task tool.

ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH.desc: Enable deferred tool loading via ToolSearch (1 = on, 0 = off).

IS_SANDBOX.desc: Advertise that Claude is running in a sandboxed environment.

USER_TYPE.desc: User-type marker consumed by internal tooling.

CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER.desc: Disable terminal redraw flicker on slow renders (1 = disable flicker, 0 = default).

CLAUDE_CODE_RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED.desc: Toggle client-side rate limiting (1 = enable, 0 = disable).

CLAUDE_CODE_MIN_TPS.desc: Minimum acceptable tokens-per-second before the client escalates or warns.

CLAUDE_CODE_NO_NERF.desc: Disable model nerfs / capability dampening (1 = disable nerfs, 0 = default).

CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL.desc: Reasoning depth per turn. 'max' forces full reasoning every turn. Overrides the settings.json effortLevel field (which caps at 'high'). Note: the 'ultrathink' prompt trigger maps to 'high', so with max set it is a downgrade.

MAX_THINKING_TOKENS.desc: Upper bound on internal reasoning ('scratch pad') tokens per turn. 31999 is the documented maximum. With CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ADAPTIVE_THINKING=1 this becomes the fixed budget rather than a ceiling.

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC.desc: Disable telemetry, error reporting, feature-flag polling, and other background network calls. May suppress some server-gated experimental features.

CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS.desc: Enable experimental multi-agent coordination tools (TeamCreate, TaskCreate/Update/List, SendMessage). WARNING: ~7x token cost when agent teams are actively used.

DEFAULT_PROMPT.desc: Prompt sent as the first message if none passed on CLI. Empty string = send no prompt.
